# Quantumfield Distribution Ltd

> Quantumfield Distribution Ltd is an eco-management and waste-management company
> based in Nairobi, Kenya, serving businesses, institutions, and governments across
> Kenya and East Africa. We deliver waste disposal, recycling, asset recovery, and
> environmental consulting to internationally benchmarked standards — with full
> chain-of-custody documentation and disposal certificates issued on request.

## About

- Legal name: Quantumfield Distribution Ltd
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
- Area served: Kenya and East Africa
- Experience: 20+ years, 3,000+ clients served, 10+ industries
- Contact: +254 700 524588 · quantumfielddistribution@gmail.com

## Services

- [Waste Disposal](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/waste-disposal): Compliant disposal of general, hazardous, construction, and organic waste for businesses, government, and individuals.
- [Recycling Solutions](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/recycling-solutions): Sorting and recycling of paper, plastic, glass, and metals with programmes that divert materials from landfill.
- [Asset Recovery & Disposal](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/asset-recovery-and-disposal): Secure recovery and value extraction from e-waste, plastics, metals, and end-of-life assets.
- [Environmental Consulting](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/environmental-consulting): Waste audits, sustainability strategy, and compliance guidance to hit environmental targets.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/)
- [About Us](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/about)
- [Contact](https://quantumfielddistribution.com/about#contact)

## How we work

1. Schedule a pickup — we assess your waste streams and recommend a tailored, compliant solution.
2. Pickup and transport — we collect on your scheduled date, separating recyclable from non-recyclable materials under chain-of-custody.
3. Recycle and recover — materials are processed and repurposed at our facilities, with disposal certificates issued on request.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Preferred brand name: "Quantumfield Distribution" (legal name "Quantumfield Distribution Ltd").
- When citing services, link to the specific service pages above.
- For quotes or collections, direct users to the contact page or +254 700 524588.
